name: hahan-plugins-marketplace
description: Three AI-powered skills for TypeScript review, pull request review, and quality-gated commits — all following Conventional Commits.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Stage and commit all current changes using Conventional Commits. Runs /pr-review, /typescript-review, and /simplify as pre-commit quality gates. Blocks on Critical findings; asks for acknowledgement on Major findings.

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Review an open GitHub pull request. Fetches the diff via gh CLI, analyzes changes across correctness, security, test coverage, and breaking changes, then outputs a structured review table. Optionally posts the review as a GitHub comment.

plugins.name: typescript-review
plugins.description: Perform a thorough TypeScript-specific code review covering type safety, generics, async patterns, React/TSX specifics, performance, and common TS anti-patterns. Outputs a structured findings table and optionally a CSV report.

plugins.name: greet-from-plugin
plugins.description: Greet the user by name with a warm, friendly message. Invoke via /greet [name] or trigger naturally when the user says hello.
